title: How Intuit, DoorDash, and Atlassian are adopting AI coding
summary: Engineering leaders from Intuit, DoorDash, and Atlassian discuss how they are adopting AI coding tools at scale, including changes to development workflows, productivity measurement approaches, and organizational strategies. Key observations include shifts in where engineers spend time, acceleration of delivery timelines, and structural changes to how work is organized across the SDLC.
